code: import axios from'axios';import Cookies from'js-cookie';const axiosInstance=axios.create({baseURL:'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','X-Requested-With':'XMLHttpRequest'}});axiosInstance.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=Cookies.get('csrftoken');if(token){config.headers['X-CSRFToken']=token;}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});export const fetchCsrfToken=async()=>{try{await axiosInstance.get('get_csrf_token');const csrfToken=Cookies.get('csrftoken');if(csrfToken){localStorage.setItem('csrfToken',csrfToken);console.error('csrfToken set');}}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching CSRF token:',error);}};export default axiosInstance;
